problem_solved: Patients with chronic conditions and nutrition insecurity lack access to medically appropriate meals, leading to poor health outcomes and higher healthcare costs
solution_description: Nation's most comprehensive food-as-medicine solutions provider delivering medically tailored meals, nutrition counseling, produce boxes, and pantry items directly to patients' homes. 9 disease-specific menus with 60+ meal options designed by registered dietitians
traction_signals: Caregivers Home-Delivered Meals Service of the Year 2025
Donated 60,000 meals in 2025 to nutrition insecure individuals
Evidence-based outcomes showing reduced total cost of care
notes: Leading medically tailored meals provider. Part of food-as-medicine movement. Serves Medicare Advantage, Medicaid, and health plan members. Acquired by PurFoods. Strong evidence base for health outcomes and cost reduction
